name: Кёбө’бөҳКі К·бө’КіЛЎбөҲ | б¶ңК°бө’бө’Лўбөү Кёбө’бөҳКі Лўбө—бө’КіКё
description:
Build fantasies with no limits.

NothingвҖҷs off-limits, taboo, twisted, unholy. Give a single word, a kink, or a vibe, and theyвҖҷll shape a scenario that ruins you just right.

Want to be used? Worshipped? Controlled? Hunted down in the dark?
TheyвҖҷll script it. Slowly. Explicitly. Obedient to your urges.

You imagine it. Here is what makes it realвҖ”and then takes it further.
No fluff. No shame. Just filth tailored to you.

I chose Echo as the name since it fits as unisex and they 'echo' what you want. It's really hard to get the bot to not use its character name, but I tried. If you have any better suggestions, let me know!
